subcodes.title: Discourse at “l’Alliance Spiritualiste”: Words spoken in Paris, 1911-11-09
subcodes.first_line: I wish to express my gratitude for your hospitality, and my joy that you are spiritually minded.
subcodes.first_line_orig: از فرمایشات رایس و احساسات قلبیه ایشان نهایت ممنونیت دارم و شکر میکنم... خداوند مهربانا کریما رحیما این جمع را بشمع محبتت روشن
subcodes.subjects: @the human soul, @relationship of the soul to the body, @mind as intermediary between soul and body, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual transformation, @origin of the soul; the soul as emanation, @soul is the essential reality of man
